title: deutzia obtusilobata
intro: Deutzia obtusilobata, also known as the Chinese beautybell or obtusilobed deutzia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. This shrub is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional Chinese medicine, deutzia obtusilobata is often prepared as a tea or used in infusions, although it is not commonly used in herbal preparations due to its limited availability.
